# Biden Faces Lawsuit From US Steel, Nippon Steel After Blocking $15 Billion Merger

| By   Madz Dizon

Nippon Steel Chairman and CEO Eiji Hashimoto speaks during a press conference at the company's head office in Tokyo on January 7, 2025. AFP via Getty Images/KAZUHIRO NOGI", "score": 0.6693348, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://ruralradio.com/rrn/abc_news/us-steel-and-nippon-steel-sue-biden-administration-over-blocked-merger-abcid2a70fe0a", "title": "US Steel and Nippon Steel sue Biden administration over blocked merger - Rural Radio Network", "content": "U.S. Steel and Nippon Steel also filed a second lawsuit against Cleveland-Cliffs, another domestic steelmaker, as well as USW President David McCall, alleging they illegally coordinated efforts to stop the merger.

Cleveland-Cliffs sought a merger of its own with U.S. Steel, the lawsuit alleges. In the absence of such a merger, Cleveland-Cliffs established an agreement with USW to prevent the acquisition of U.S. Steel by Nippon Steel, the lawsuit claims.", "score": 0.64020914, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.euronews.com/2025/01/07/us-steel-and-nippon-file-lawsuit-after-biden-blocks-merger-deal", "title": "US Steel and Nippon file lawsuit after Biden blocks merger deal | Euronews", "content": "Nippon Steel and US Steel filed a federal lawsuit on Monday challenging a Biden administration decision to block Nippon's proposed $15bn (€14bn) acquisition of the Pittsburgh company.

The firms claimed that the head of the Steelworkers union and a rival steelmaker worked together to scuttle the buyout.

In moving to block the transaction on Friday, Biden said US companies producing a large amount of steel needed to "keep leading the fight on behalf of America’s national interests".", "score": 0.63125396, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://www.tag24.com/en/politics/politicians/joe-biden/biden-administration-hit-with-lawsuit-from-nippon-steel-and-us-steel-over-blocked-merger-3348695", "title": "Biden administration hit with lawsuit from Nippon Steel and US Steel over blocked merger | TAG24", "content": "Nippon Steel and US Steel filed suit Monday over President Joe Biden's decision to block the Japanese giant's proposed acquisition of its American rival.

Nippon Steel and U.S. Steel sued over the decision, telling the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit that the order blocking the merger was “blatantly unconstitutional.”. ## CFIUS is due to deliver its decision on December 22-23

US President Joe Biden plans to officially block the sale of US Steel to Japan’s Nippon Steel for national security reasons after the Committee on Foreign Investment in the United States (CFIUS) makes its decision. Bloomberg reports, citing sources.

The CFIUS, which has been considering the proposed takeover for most of this year, is expected to deliver its decision to Biden by December 22-23.", "score": 0.4018996, "raw_content": null}]
